headline: IREN Surges 16% on $4B AI Cloud Boost

article.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
article.summary: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.

headline: Bitcoin Bear Market Ends March 31: 50% Rebound Expected

article.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
article.summary: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

headline: Chipmakers Boost Stocks 2% as Oil Gains Fade

article.title: Stocks Get Lift From Chipmakers as Oil Rally Wanes: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A bounce in chipmakers drove Wall Street gains, with stocks also rising as an oil rally faded on hopes for a revival of a peace deal between the US and Iran that has all-but collapsed amid an escalation of hostilities.

headline: Alkegen Seeks $1B Refinance Amid Bankruptcy Filing

article.title: Alkegen Plans Prepackaged Bankruptcy in Deal for Fresh Cash
article.summary: Alkegen has signed a restructuring deal with lenders that will inject the specialty materials maker with new money and slash its debt load by about $3.1 billion.

headline: $1.65M Flash Loan Attack Halts Allbridge Protocol

article.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
article.summary: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

article.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.
